text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Passing by the outdoor stage one day, I happen
to hear some lively voices.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Heave, ho, heave, ho!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa whoa, hold the mikoshi steady! Ya call
yourselves Umamusume? Show me some real Edo
spirit!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Half-hearted effort won't make us the heart of
the festival! Move your legs in time with the
chant!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Heave, ho! Heave, ho!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, something's still missin'... But what? Gusto?
Pep?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you're a trainer, right? I'm sure ya got places
to be, but mind givin' me a bit of advice?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We're carryin' the mikoshi for an event in the
shoppin' district.. But our performance isn't
lookin' the part.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, nobody's gonna feel the Edo spirit
we're tryin' to convey. Got any idea what we're
missin'?
choice_data_list: Maybe a bit more vigor in your movements?
Maybe you just need an audience?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Vigor, huh... yeah, inchin' forward in this cramped
space isn't enough to get in the zone.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All righty, folks... follow my lead! We're takin' this
bad boy for a spin! That means you too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hoisting the mikoshi up, we proceed throughout
the school grounds and arrive at the ramp track.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Heave! Ho! Heave! Ho!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Now zat's more like it! Once we make it to the top
of this hill, we can call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That being said, that's one steep hill! Guess I'll
just join in on the action!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hup... Huh? Za hell?! My shoulders don't reach
the pole!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Aaargh, why'd I have to be so short?! Wait, if I
get up on my tippy-toes... I can just about...
reach!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her small stature, Inari One's powerful
chants invigorate the rest of us, and we
successfully carry the mikoshi to the top of the
hill.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having a crowd of spectators simulate the actual
event could make for good practice.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Spectators, huh. I get it. Hearin' the crowd's
cheerin' is like feelin' the wind push your sails.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
In that case... I'm countin' on ya, Trainer! Show me
your energy and cheer for us!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Quit dawdlin'! Come on, altogether now! Heave,
ho! Heave, ho!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Say it like you mean it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's more like it! I already feel stronger! Now
try again, this time with all your breath!
